GT2.version_note: Hotlap reference times for 19 GT World Challenge tracks sourced from Coach Dave Academy (CDA4, hotlap mode, 24°C air, 33°C track, Pirelli DHE). 6 additional tracks (COTA, Donington Park, Indianapolis, Oulton Park, Snetterton, Watkins Glen) are estimated using the observed GT2/GT3 pace ratio across known tracks, with per-car deltas consistent with the 19-track CDA dataset. Porsche 935 times are estimated across all 25 tracks. All estimated entries are flagged with estimated=true.
